*   b_n = complex number corresponding to amplitude and phase
*   C = correlation matrix
*   f = the acoustic frequency

*   Ω_n = POD mode shape; n = 1, 2, 3, ... M

title: Final-POD_AIAA_fumi_12-22-2009
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
1. Mathematical equations:
    *   Z(x, y,t) = Z_bar(x, y,t) + z(x, y,t)
    *   z(x, y,t) approximately equals the sum from n=1 to M of [a_n(t) * phi_n(x, y)]
    *   Integral over D of [phi_n1(x, y) * phi_n2(x, y)] dxdy = 1 if n1 = n2,  0 otherwise
    *   (C)_ij = (1/M) * Integral over D of [v^(i)(x, y) * v^(j)(x, y)] dxdy,  i, j = 1,..., M
    *   CA^(n) = lambda_n * A^(n),  n = 1,..., M

2. NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3. NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

4. NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

5. Key numbers, constants, parameters:
    *   M: total frame number of data
    *   x, y: spatial coordinate, pixel number in video
    *   t: temporal coordinate, frame number
    *   Z(x, y,t): function of combustion dynamics captured by high speed video camera
    *   a_n(t): waveform
    *   phi_n(x, y): mode shapes, spatial function
    *   lambda_n: eigenvalues
    *   A^(n): eigenvectors

title: Final-POD_AIAA_fumi_12-22-2009
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
Here's the extracted technical content:

1.  **Mathematical equations:**
    *   phi_n(x, y) = Sum_{k=1}^{M} A_k^(n)V^(k)(x, y)  n = 1,..., M
    *   a_n(t) = Integral_{D} z(x,t) phi_n(x) dx
    *   z(x, y,t) = Sum_{n=1}^{M} b_n(x, y)e^(iota_n t)
    *   Integral_{D} e^(iota_n t) e^(iota_m t) dt = { 1 if (n=m); 0 otherwise

    *   Pixel Reduction: 200 x 150 cells (average of 4 x 4 pixels)
    *   Bit depth of pixel data: 32 bits (float)
    *   LabView Version 7.1 software
    *   Phantom V7.3 high-speed CCD video camera
